settings.body:
• Designed to match your door. Custom-sized and styled for a seamless architectural fit.
  • Bright, balanced light. Brings clarity and character to shared spaces.

settings.heading: Key Features
settings.content: Consult the number in column CC in the  New Site Product Pages spreadsheet has a number in column CC that corresponds to a Key Features Group number in this Key Features Bank.

settings.heading: Door Setup
settings.intro:
Sidelights can be ordered as a slab only or installed in a jamb.

Each sidelight is made to your measurements and reviewed with you before production begins, ensuring a clean, professional fit in your home.

settings.text_1: by hand in upstate New York.

settings.heading: Customize With
settings.subheading: Every choice, clearly explained — so your sidelight fits, functions, and feels like it has always been part of your home.

settings.heading: Wood Options
settings.subheading: Choose the right wood for your sidelight
settings.description: Every Vintage Doors sidelight is built from 100% solid, kiln-dried hardwood — never veneer or composite. Every species is chosen for long-term performance and timeless beauty.
settings.bottom_text: Select a wood species suited to the location of your sidelight, whether it will be protected indoors or outside and exposed to the elements.

settings.title: Glass Options
settings.subtitle: Let in light, protect from weather, and match your home’s character
settings.description: Choose from a range of clear, decorative, and energy-efficient glass options to balance light, privacy, and performance.
settings.include_richtext:
Glass options include:

  • Clear Tempered
  • Low-E
  • Acid Etched
  • Glue Chip
  • Aquatex
  • Original Pattern #62
  • Seedy Reamy
  • Wavy Restoration
  • Stained Glass

Low-E and Argon-filled glass options improve insulation, reduce heat transfer, and minimize drafts.
settings.thickness_text: Standard glass thickness is ½", or 1" insulated glass on 2¼"-thick doors. Specialty decorative glass may vary.
settings.construction_text: Most models feature True Divided Lites (TDL) for authentic construction and architectural detail. Some designs use Simulated Divided Lites (SDL) to achieve the same classic look with modern efficiency.

settings.title: Glass Options
settings.subtitle: Add light, privacy, or character to any interior space
settings.description: Choose from a range of clear, decorative, and energy-efficient glass options to balance light, privacy, and performance.
settings.include_richtext:
Glass options include:

  • Clear Tempered
  • Acid Etched
  • Glue Chip
  • Aquatex
  • Original Pattern #62
  • Seedy Reamy
  • Wavy Restoration
  • Mirror
  • Stained Glass

Bevels may be added for extra detail.
settings.thickness_text: Standard glass thickness is ⅛", with custom thicknesses available for select designs.
settings.construction_text: Most models feature True Divided Lites (TDL) for authentic construction and architectural detail. Some designs use Simulated Divided Lites (SDL) to achieve the same classic look.

settings.title: For exposed locations
settings.text: African Mahogany and Spanish Cedar are our most weather-resistant woods — stable, rot-resistant, and built to endure sun, rain, and seasonal change.

settings.heading: Customize With Confidence
settings.subheading: Every choice, clearly explained — so your door fits, functions, and feels like it was always part of your home
settings.left_subheading: Choose the wood that fits your porch, coverage, and climate.
settings.left_text: Every exterior door begins with 100% solid, kiln-dried hardwood — never veneer, MDF, or composite. Every species is chosen for long-term performance and timeless beauty.

settings.title: Wood Species
settings.text: Choose the wood that fits your porch, coverage, and climate. Every exterior door begins with 100% solid, kiln-dried hardwood — never veneer, MDF, or composite. Every species is chosen for long-term performance and timeless beauty.

settings.title: Size and Thickness
settings.text: Get a perfect fit — custom built to your exact measurements. Choose from standard sizing options or provide your own measurements. Every door is made to your specifications for a perfect fit in new or historic homes.

settings.title: Screen Inserts
settings.text: Five different screen types are available, offering different color and functional options. Screen inserts can be removable or permanent. Removable screen inserts snap securely onto your door, held by discreet clips, with frames available in two colors.

settings.title: Storm Glass Inserts
settings.text: Optional storm glass inserts can be removable or permanent, offered in three different glass types. Like our removable screen inserts, storm glass inserts snap securely onto your door, held by discreet clips, and are available in two frame colors.

settings.title: Door Setups
settings.text: Choose the setup that fits how you’ll install your door: slab only, on pre-hung on brick molding, pre-hung on the door jamb, or pre-hung with the entry door

settings.title: Sidelights and Transoms
settings.text: Enhance your entryway: order your door, sidelights, and transom individually or together as a complete unit for perfect proportion and fit.

settings.title: Pet Doors
settings.text: Optional solid wood pet doors can be integrated directly into your new screen, storm, or garden gate door — designed to complement your chosen style and and sized to fit your pet’s needs.

settings.title: ...And More
settings.text: There are many more details and options that can be selected when you customize your screen & storm door. Use our customization tool to create the perfect door for your home.

settings.heading: Customize With Confidence
settings.subheading: Every choice, clearly explained — so your door fits, functions, and feels like it was always part of your home
settings.footer_text: We’ll walk you through all the options that will make your door, yours.

settings.slide_text: Flexible, low-maintenance, and easy to clean — our standard for everyday use.
settings.slide_text_2: More rigid and long-lasting. Available in black or silver for a crisp, clean look.
settings.slide_text_3: Elegant and enduring. Develops a natural patina over time.
settings.slide_text_4: Tear-resistant mesh that stands up to claws and play.
settings.slide_text_5: Tightly woven to block even the smallest insects — ideal for cabins, lakesides, or buggy climates.

settings.slide_text: Impact-resistant and crystal clear — shields your home from wind and rain while letting in natural light.
settings.slide_text_2: Helps regulate temperature, reduce UV exposure, and cut energy costs — ideal for year-round comfort.
settings.slide_text_3: Textured or patterned options add privacy and charm without sacrificing protection.

settings.heading: Screen and Glass Inserts
settings.subHeading: Enhance your home’s entrance with better air flow, protection, or both.
settings.description:
Screen and storm glass for your door can be removable or permanent, depending on how you plan to use your porch.


Removable inserts snap securely in and out of the wood surround built into your porch panel, held by discreet interior clips — no tools, no visible hardware.


Each insert is framed in ¾" aluminum, finished in white or bronze to complement your panel’s design.

settings.heading: Built to Your Measurements
settings.subheading: Get a perfect fit — custom-made to your exact specifications
settings.content:
Every sidelight we build is made to your measurements for a perfect fit.

Standard thickness is 1 ½ inches for interior sidelights and 1 ¾ inches for exterior sidelights. We can also build up to 2 ¼ in for heavier or custom projects.

Our team reviews every measurement with you before production begins.

settings.title: Sidelights, Transoms, Entrance Units
settings.text: Create a cohesive, well-balanced entryway
settings.richtext:
Order your door, sidelights, and transom individually or together as a complete unit for perfect proportion and fit. When built within the same frame, all elements align for even sightlines, balanced height, and consistent light.


  • Sidelights: Add symmetry and light beside your door. 
  • Transoms: Bring in height and daylight while maintaining privacy.
  • Entrance Units: Combine all components into a single frame for easy installation and a unified look.

settings.title: Sidelights, Transoms
settings.text: Let four-legged family come and go in style
settings.richtext:
Our solid wood pet doors are integrated directly into your new screen, storm, or garden gate door — designed and sized to complement your chosen style.

Each pet door is framed in solid hardwood and built seamlessly into the layout, so it looks like part of the design rather than an afterthought.

Choose from seven sizes to fit any breed. Our team will ensure the proportions and panel details stay balanced—so your home keeps its charm, and your pet gains real independence.

settings.text: Let four-legged family come and go in style

settings.title: Finishing & Weather Sealing
settings.text: Protect your door and preserve its beauty for decades to come
settings.richtext:
Every exterior door ships smooth and unfinished, with step-by-step guidance to help you seal, paint, or stain it for long-term protection and lasting beauty. Proper finishing is essential to safeguard your investment and maintain warranty coverage

If you plan to paint, optional hand priming provides an even base coat, saving prep time and improving adhesion.


When ordered pre-hung, your door includes custom hardwood jambs, a mahogany threshold, and full sweeps and seals for complete weather protection right out of the crate.


If ordered as a slab, it will arrive ready to be sealed and finished on site using the included care instructions.

settings.heading: Optional Add-ons
settings.subheading: Complement and enhance your door with added features
settings.cta_sub_heading: We’ll walk you through all the options that will make your door, yours.

settings.title: Customize Your Sidelight
settings.text: Choose your style, wood, and size using our easy online tool. Every sidelight is made to order in solid hardwood. If you’d like guidance, we’re always here to walk you through it.

settings.title: Approve Your Build
settings.text: Before we begin, you’ll receive a detailed proposal and scale drawing to review. This is your chance to confirm size, specs, and configuration. Nothing moves forward until you give us the go-ahead.

settings.title: We Build & Deliver
settings.text: Your sidelight is crafted by hand, packed with care, and shipped directly to your home or job site within 6–8 weeks. When they arrive, they’re ready for your installer (or you) to finish and install. If questions come up during installation, our team is just a call away.

settings.heading: How Your Sidelight Comes to Life
settings.subheading: From first sketch to final delivery, we’re with you every step of the way.

settings.heading: Getting the Measurements Right
settings.content:
Every porch and entry is a little different. Some openings are simple—others take more care. Either way, we'll help you get it right.

Not sure which applies? Our Complete Measuring Guide breaks it down with diagrams and details. And if something looks tricky—older porches, uneven trim, or out-of-square frames—just send us a photo or give us a call. We’ll review your measurements before anything goes into production.

settings.title: 100% Solid Wood
settings.description: Only kiln-dried, furniture-grade hardwoods — never veneer or composite.

settings.title: Craftsmanship Warranty
settings.description: Guaranteed against defects in materials and workmanship for 1 year.

settings.title: Perfect Fit Guarantee
settings.description: Sized to your exact opening — if it doesn’t fit, we’ll make it right.

settings.title: Insured Delivery
settings.description: Crated with care, shipped safely to any home or job site nationwide.

settings.title: Real people. Real care.
settings.description: Call or email us anytime — you’ll always reach someone who knows our sidelights.

settings.title: Built the Right Way:
settings.sub_title: For strength, fit, and lifetimes of use
settings.text:
Each Vintage Doors sidelight is built with solid, kiln-dried hardwood — shaped, joined, and finished by hand with care and precision. Our builders use traditional joinery and time-honored milling methods to ensure every sidelight stays square and steady for decades.

Because each one is built to your measurements, it fits cleanly and installs with ease. Finished and cared for properly, it resists warping, wear, and weather for generations.

These sidelights are truly built to belong — crafted the way your grandparents expected, and the way your grandchildren will still admire.

settings.header: Do sidelights fit with any entry door?
settings.content: Yes. We build sidelights to match your chosen door style, wood, and finish so the whole entry feels cohesive. Each unit is custom-sized to your opening, so whether you’re pairing them with a new door or adding them to an existing entry, the proportions look right and the fit is exact.

You can choose from a wide range of insulated glass styles that let you balance light, privacy, and character. Options include clear tempered, Low-E insulated glass for energy efficiency, and textured patterns such as acid-etched, glue chip, or seedy reamy. Beveled and stained glass are also available for a more decorative look. 

Standard insulated sidelights use ½″ exterior glass for strength and energy efficiency. Some specialty patterns are available in custom thicknesses. You can explore all the options in our Glass Guide, which also helps you choose the style that’s right for your home.

Yes. Sidelights use insulated glass units set into solid hardwood frames. Options include Clear Low-E insulated glass or Clear Low-E with Argon for added efficiency. Built to the same standard as our entry doors, sidelights keep out drafts and maintain energy performance while bringing natural light into your home.

You can order sidelights as separate units to fit alongside an existing frame, or as part of a complete pre-hung entry with your new door. Ordering them together ensures the proportions match and makes installation simpler, but either option is straightforward for a carpenter to set in place.

Yes. Sidelights are built to the same standard as your entry door. The tempered insulated glass is sealed into a solid hardwood frame, so it stays tight and secure. Paired with the right lockset on your main door, sidelights add light and beauty without compromising safety.

settings.title: “This is not a big box door.”
settings.description: "I purchased a set of Victorian double screen doors for my 100-year-old home. They’re not just beautiful — they’re incredibly well made. These aren’t big-box store-type doors. I have no doubt they’ll remain with the house for the next 100 years."

settings.title: “Truly a world-class company.”
settings.description: "We ordered a custom storm door with interchangeable glass and screen from Vintage Doors. Our carpenter was amazed at how well it fit — it matched our solid door exactly. Ordering online can be scary, but not with this company."

settings.title: “The best screen door we’ve ever seen.”
settings.description: "The custom-built screen door is both handsome and sturdy — crafted exactly as we specified. The workmanship is superior. Easily the best screen door we’ve ever had."

settings.title: “A perfect fit for our 1917 house.”
settings.description: "We have a combination screen/storm door from Vintage Doors. Five years in, it’s still solid and looks gorgeous. One of the most satisfying purchases we’ve ever made."

settings.title: “Quality and craftsmanship are top-shelf.”
settings.description: "I bought a Spanish Cedar screen door in 2012 for a porch in the Northeast — full exposure, year-round weather. It still looks brand new. The Vintage Doors team helped me choose the right wood, no pressure. Just knowledge and care."

settings.title: “It belongs with the house.”
settings.description: "We replaced a cheap aluminum screen door on our 1900-era home with a solid wood one from Vintage Doors. The quality is unmatched, and it fits so well, it looks like it’s always been there."
“I searched everywhere, then found Vintage Doors. The whole process was seamless — measuring, design, delivery.”

settings.heading: Hardware That Belongs
settings.subheading: We’ve picked the kind we’d use in our own homes — tested for fit and finish
settings.headingDesc: Our hardware collection includes surface-mounted latch sets, Suffolk latches, hinges, and door closers — each tested for fit, feel, and balance with solid wood doors. A range of materials and finishes let you match your home’s existing details or maintain a period-correct look that feels true to its character.

settings.heading: Questions about our sidelights?
settings.text:
We’ve helped homeowners balance historic façades, match sidelights to existing doors, and plan entries that bring in light without sacrificing security.

If you’d like to talk through proportions, inserts, or fit before ordering, we’re here to help.
